entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY AND MUCH COOLER
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE LOWER 40S
NORTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
NOT AS COOL WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

SHOWERS
HIGHS AROUND 70
TEMPERATURE FALLING INTO THE LOWER 50S IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 30S

data.HIGHS: SUNNY, COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 50S

entry.data:
PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
LOWS AROUND 40

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 50S
